ShortDescription.Value: Scale Public Transit depots, Passengers, and increase Transit Line slider limits.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Adjust Transit Capacity (ATC)
Everything is OPTIONAL!
#### Features - **Transit depots:** change max vehicles per depot (Bus, Ferry, Subway, Taxi, Tram, Train) - **Passengers:** change maximum seats (Bus, Tram, Train, Subway, Ship, Ferry, Airplane) - **Extend Transit Lines:** optional toggle to expand the in-game slider ( if you want just 1 bus on a line or more buses, etc.)
### Notes 🚍🚋🚆✈️🚢 - *Adjust Sliders* at any time, no restart needed; supports switching cities. - *Depot capacity* = maximum number of vehicles a single depot can maintain/spawn (extension building not scaled). - Avoid other depot/passenger capacity mods to avoid conflicts (they override each other). - No Harmony patch or Reflection used; less likely to break on patch days. - Safe to remove any time (use Reset buttons to return to vanilla game values). - The transit line feature follows the game’s own route logic, so the maximum is variable rather than a fixed static cap. - On tested routes this can go as low as **1** vehicle and much higher than vanilla on the upper end.
#### Settings file - **new settings file**: `ModsSettings/AdjustTransit` - Older saved settings from earlier ATC do **not** carry over, just set the sliders again and you are good to go.
### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
### Credits - River-Mochi: author - yenyang: code review and testing. - The transit section is inspired by Wayz's original Depot Capacity Changer. - Necko1996: testing - BugsyG: testing
### Performance This is designed to *not* run in the city per-frame. Player makes changes in Options Menu > then mod goes idle.
### 11 Languages
- English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski Polish, Português Brazilian - 한국어, 日本語, 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese), 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese
### Tip: If you want to increase transit route slider a little more, add some stops to the route. Game auto-increases the max based on different factors, adding stops is just the easiest to nudge it.
tags: city dispatch, transit line increase, control municipal, public transit system, change size, increase people passengers, depot size demand, decrease passengers
Publish.ChangeLog: - This branch uses a new settings file AdjustTransit, so older saved settings do not carry over, just set your sliders again. - Added ferry support to depot and passenger controls. - Kept the optional Extended Transit Lines toggle.
